subcodes.first_line: Follow thou what hath now been revealed unto thee from the Book of God, for verily the Cause of God is the Truth, and all shall be brought before Us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. ان اتبع ما اوحی الیک الآن من کتاب الله فان امرالله لحق و کل علینا لیعرضون
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @justice and wrath of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
